ddls:
CREATE TABLE "book_returns" (
  "bookreturn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book return transaction */,
  "returned_date" TEXT /* Date when the book was returned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the book return */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the member about the return */,
  "isbn_id" TEXT /* ISBN of the book being returned */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member returning the book */,
  "fine_charged" REAL /* Fine charged for the late return */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the book return (e.g., returned, overdue, lost) */,
  "return_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the book upon return (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookreturn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_returns_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_returns_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_returns_isbn_id FOREIGN KEY ("isbn_id") REFERENCES books ("isbn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "isbn_id" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "copies_available" INTEGER /* Number of copies available in the library */,
  "total_copies" INTEGER /* Total number of copies in the library */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isbn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date of membership registration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the membership is active */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., student, faculty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., return, reservation) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member involved in the transaction */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who handled the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fines" (
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fine */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine charged */,
  "fine_date" TEXT /* Date when the fine was charged */,
  "fine_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fine (e.g., late return, damaged book) */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fine has been paid */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member associated with the fine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member receiving the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., overdue, fine reminder) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member has read the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fine_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fine being paid */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid towards the fine */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fine_payments_fine_id FOREIGN KEY ("fine_id") REFERENCES fines ("fine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member making the reservation */,
  "isbn_id" TEXT /* ISBN of the book being reserved */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date when the reservation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., active, fulfilled, canceled) */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Expected pickup date for the reserved book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_isbn_id FOREIGN KEY ("isbn_id") REFERENCES books ("isbn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
